stages.concept:
# Unit 066: to부정사의 부사적 용법 (조건, 형용사 수식) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **to부정사의 부사적 용법** 중 **조건**과 **형용사 수식**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **조건** — ~한다면

> **To hear** him speak, you would think he is a foreigner.
> 그가 말하는 것을 들으면, 외국인이라고 생각할 것이다.

> **To see** her dance, you would be amazed.
> 그녀가 춤추는 것을 보면, 놀랄 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **형용사 수식** — to부정사가 형용사를 꾸며주는 경우예요.

> This problem is easy **to solve**.
> 이 문제는 풀기 쉽다.

> English is difficult **to learn**.
> 영어는 배우기 어렵다.

> The water is safe **to drink**.
> 그 물은 마시기에 안전하다.

> This book is interesting **to read**.
> 이 책은 읽기에 재미있다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"This problem is easy (       ) solve."
1. to ✅
2. for
3. that

👩‍🏫 선생님: 이 패턴에서 to부정사의 목적어가 문장의 주어와 같아요.

> This problem is easy **to solve**. (solve the problem → this problem이 주어)

🧑‍🎓 학생: to부정사가 형용사를 꾸며줄 때는 '~하기에'라는 뜻이 되는 거군요! easy to ~, difficult to ~, safe to ~ 패턴을 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 066: to부정사의 부사적 용법 조건, 형용사 수식 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임에 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
This book is fun to read. (     )
> **정답** 형용사 수식

---

**02.** To hear him talk, you would think he is a teacher.
> **정답** 조건

---

**03.** English is not easy to learn.
> **정답** 형용사 수식

---

**04.** To see her smile, you would feel happy.
> **정답** 조건

---

**05.** The game is exciting to play.
> **정답** 형용사 수식

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
This song is easy singing.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** singing → to sing

---

**07.** The movie is interesting watching.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** watching → to watch

---

**08.** This puzzle is hard solving.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** solving → to solve

---

**09.** The cake was delicious eating.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** eating → to eat

---

**10.** This chair is comfortable sitting on.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** sitting → to sit

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
이 노래는 부르기 쉽다.
This song is easy .
> **정답** to sing

---

**12.** 이 책은 읽기에 재미있다.
This book is fun .
> **정답** to read

---

**13.** 그 문제는 풀기 어렵다.
The problem is hard .
> **정답** to solve

---

**14.** 그를 보면 그가 운동선수라고 생각할 것이다.
him play, you would think he is an athlete.
> **정답** To see

---

**15.** 이 의자는 앉기 편하다.
This chair is comfortable .
> **정답** to sit on

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
이 게임은 하기 재미있다.
is This game fun to play
> **정답** This / game / is / fun / to / play

---

**17.** 영어는 배우기 쉽지 않다.
is not English easy to learn
> **정답** English / is / not / easy / to / learn

---

**18.** 이 퍼즐은 풀기 어렵다.
This hard is puzzle to solve
> **정답** This / puzzle / is / hard / to / solve

---

**19.** 그 노래는 듣기에 좋다.
is good The song to listen to
> **정답** The / song / is / good / to / listen / to

---

**20.** 이 음식은 먹기에 맛있다.
This delicious is food to eat
> **정답** This / food / is / delicious / to / eat
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 066: to부정사의 부사적 용법 조건, 형용사 수식 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The car is expensive ________________. (이 차는
사기에 비싸다.)
I would be happy ________________ the lottery. (나는
복권에 당첨되면 기쁠 것이다.)
buy - win
to buy - to win
buy - winning
to buy - winning
> **정답** to buy - to win

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The questions on the test were difficult
______________ alone.
(그 시험의 문제들은 혼자 풀기에 어렵다.)
________________ the test, it might be a miracle.
(그 시험을 통과한다면, 그것은 기적일지도 모른다.)
solve - To pass
solving - Passing
to solve - To pass
to solve - Pass
> **정답** to solve - To pass

---

**03.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀의 사랑스러운 미소를 보면, 너는 그녀와 사랑에 빠질
거야.
To looking at her lovely smile, you will fall in
love with her.
Looked at her lovely smile, you will fall in love
with her.
To look at her lovely smile, you will fall in love
with her.
Look at her lovely smile, you will fall in love
with her.
> **정답** To look at her lovely smile, you will fall in love with
her.

---

**04.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 바다는 수영하기에 위험하다.
This ocean is dangerous to swim.
This ocean is dangerous swim in.
This ocean is dangerous to swim in.
This ocean is dangerous swimming in.
> **정답** This ocean is dangerous to swim in.

---

**05.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
무서운 동물을 보면, 그 아기는 울지도 모른다.
The baby may cry see scary animals.
The baby may cry to seeing scary animals.
The baby may cry to see scary animals.
The baby may cry seeing scary animals.
> **정답** The baby may cry to see scary animals.

---

**06.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> He would be happy to win the game.
To jog every morning became my hobby.
People told their children to eat healthy.
To receive a call from him, she would be
surprised.
Tom must be clever to notice some changes.
> **정답** To receive a call from him, she would be surprised.

---

**07.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> The floor was slippery to walk on barefoot.
Alphabet is easy to read and write.
Amy came to school early to talk with her
teacher.
He was lucky to have a beautiful wife and
amazing kids.
I am very pleased to invite you all to my
wedding.
• slippery 미끄러운
> **정답** Alphabet is easy to read and write.

---

**08.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> This song is difficult to sing along.
The movie was cruel to watch with my
teenager son.
I was happy to see him again.
He must be full to skip his dinner.
She visited a hospital to get some medicine.
• cruel 잔인한
> **정답** The movie was cruel to watch with my teenager son.

---

**09.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> To hear his story, you would know it's a lie.
She worked hard day and night, only to get
fired.
Computer programming is hard to learn.
It would be wonderful to take some time for
relaxation.
He must be careless to make such a mistake.
> **정답** It would be wonderful to take some time for
relaxation.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To lose the game this time, I will give up
baseball.
His simple name is easy to remember.
I would be honored to have him as my
assistance.
This new coffee machine is difficult handling.
> **정답** This new coffee machine is difficult handling.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> To see him again, I will tell him the truth.
I was happy to meet him.
He grew up to be a doctor.
Her words are usually very difficult to
understand.
To see her sing, you would take her for a
professional singer.
> **정답** To see her sing, you would take her for a
professional singer.

---

**12.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> To finish the task, I will take a short trip to
somewhere nice.
Amy had no time to take care of her health.
I like to play soccer with my friends.
It is fun to play soccer with friends.
I would be disappointed to miss out the
chance.
> **정답** I would be disappointed to miss out the chance.

---

**13.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> The insect was so tiny to catch with a hand.
The top shelf is very high to reach.
The CEO hired more workers to open another
business.
He must be very smart to solve the difficult
problem.
Amy was shocked to hear the news.
> **정답** The top shelf is very high to reach.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The officer might be tired to staying in the
office a little longer.
To win the lottery ticket, I will buy whatever I
want.
Even for older people, this new laptop is easy
use.
To passing the driver's test, he can drive to
work.
> **정답** To win the lottery ticket, I will buy whatever I want.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The English article was very long to read
quickly.
To having more time, my job can be less
stressful.
Some furniture is very heavy carried alone.
They might be frightened to seen a real ghost.
• frightened 놀란
> **정답** The English article was very long to read quickly.

---

**16.** 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를
넣으시오.
If you have any questions, please contact us by
email.
, please contact us by
email.
> **정답** To, have, any, questions

---

**17.** 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를
넣으시오.
I would be more than happy if I met my favorite
actor.
I would be more than happy
.
> **정답** to, meet, my, favorite, actor

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
This song is difficult playing.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** playing. → to play

---

**19.** 다음 글에서 부사적 쓰임으로 쓰인 to부정사를 찾으시오.
These students learn① to speak English twice a
week. For them, English is difficult because many
English words are long and hard ② to memorize. But,
they decided not ③ to give up. They are trying ④ to
remember many words by writing them.
> **정답** 2

---

**20.** 다음 글에서 부사적 쓰임으로 쓰인 to부정사를 모두
찾으시오. [2개]
I had some time ① to think about my future today.
I've always wanted ② to be an author. ③ To become
a writer, I will write both fiction and non-fiction. My
books may be difficult ④ to understand. I hope my
dream will come true.
> **정답** 3, 4
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 066 to부정사의 부사적 용법 조건, 형용사 수식중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그 나라는 혼자 여행하기에 안전하다. [safe, travel]
The country is  (     )   (     )   (     )  alone.
정답 safe, to, travel

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to부정사를 사용할
것)
그녀를 다시 만나면, 나는 그녀에게 진실을 말할 것이다.
[see]
  (     )   (     )  again, I will tell her the truth.
정답 To, see, her

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to부정사를 사용할
것)
무료 쿠폰을 받으면 그는 만족할 거야. [get, a free
coupon]
He would be satisfied  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 to, get, a, free, coupon

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그들이 함께 있는 것을 본다면, 너는 그들이 형제라고 생각
할 거야.
힌트 (     ) to, them, see, together
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , you would think they
were brothers.
정답 To, see, them, together

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
아기를 안기에 그녀의 손은 매우 더러웠다.
힌트 (     ) a baby, dirty, hold, to
Her hands were very  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 dirty, to, hold, a, baby

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) simple, cook
A: Why don't you make pasta for dinner?
B: Pasta is not  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 simple, to, cook

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) become, a class captain
A: What would make you happy, Sandra?
B: I would be very happy  (     )   (     )  
  (     )  next year.
정답 to, become, a, class, captain

---

**08.** 주어진 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오. (to
부정사로 쓸 것)
If I have a baby, I will name her Amy.
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , I will name her Amy.
정답 To, have, a, baby

---

**09.** 주어진 두 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(to 부정사로 쓸 것)
The box was very heavy. I couldn't carry it alone.
The box was very heavy  (     )   (     )  alone.
정답 to, carry

---

**10.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 글을 완성하시오.
have / live / adopt / take care
I've always wanted  (     )  with a dog.
 a dog, I will bathe and walk her
every day. But my parents don't even allow me to talk
about a dog. They think I am still young
 of pets. I have a secret plan. My
plan is  (     )  a dog in the future.
• adopt 입양하다
정답 to live, To have, to take care, to adopt

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 066: to부정사의 부사적 용법 조건, 형용사 수식 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The bag is expensive ________________.
(이 가방은 사기에 비싸다.) I would be happy ________________ the prize. (나는 상을 받으면 기쁠 것이다.) buy - win to buy - to win buy - winning to buy - winning
> 정답: to buy - to win

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The questions on the quiz were difficult ______________ alone.
(그 퀴즈의 문제들은 혼자 풀기에 어렵다.) ________________ the quiz, it might be a miracle. (그 퀴즈를 통과한다면, 그것은 기적일지도 모른다.) solve - To pass solving - Passing to solve - To pass to solve - Pass
> 정답: to solve - To pass

---

**03.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그의 멋진 그림을 보면, 너는 감동받을 거야.
To looking at his amazing painting, you will be impressed.
Looked at his amazing painting, you will be impressed.
To look at his amazing painting, you will be impressed.
Look at his amazing painting, you will be impressed.
> 정답: To look at his amazing painting, you will be impressed.

---

**04.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 강은 수영하기에 위험하다.
This river is dangerous to swim.
This river is dangerous swim in.
This river is dangerous to swim in.
This river is dangerous swimming in.
> 정답: This river is dangerous to swim in.

---

**05.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
큰 소리를 들으면, 그 아기는 울지도 모른다.
The baby may cry hear loud noises.
The baby may cry to hearing loud noises.
The baby may cry to hear loud noises.
The baby may cry hearing loud noises.
> 정답: The baby may cry to hear loud noises.

---

**06.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> He would be happy to win the match.
To jog every morning became my habit.
People told their children to eat well.
To receive a letter from him, she would be surprised.
Tom must be clever to notice some changes.
> 정답: To receive a letter from him, she would be surprised.

---

**07.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> The floor was slippery to walk on barefoot.
The alphabet is easy to read and write.
Amy came to class early to talk with her teacher.
He was lucky to have a wonderful family and great friends.
I am very pleased to invite you all to my party.
> 정답: The alphabet is easy to read and write.

---

**08.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> This song is difficult to sing along.
The movie was scary to watch with my younger brother.
I was happy to see him again.
He must be full to skip his lunch.
She visited a pharmacy to get some medicine.
> 정답: The movie was scary to watch with my younger brother.

---

**09.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> To hear his story, you would know it's a lie.
She worked hard day and night, only to get fired.
Computer coding is hard to learn.
It would be wonderful to take some time for a vacation.
He must be careless to make such an error.
> 정답: It would be wonderful to take some time for

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
To lose the match this time, I will give up tennis.
His simple name is easy to remember.
I would be honored to have her as my partner.
This new camera is difficult handling.
> 정답: This new camera is difficult handling.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>문장과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> To see him again, I will tell him the truth.
I was happy to meet him.
He grew up to be a teacher.
Her words are usually very difficult to understand.
To see her dance, you would think she is a professional dancer.
> 정답: To see her dance, you would think she is a

---

**12.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> To finish the project, I will take a short trip somewhere nice.
Amy had no time to take care of her pet.
I like to play basketball with my friends.
It is fun to play basketball with friends.
I would be disappointed to miss out on the chance.
